system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi, this is Isabella Johansson. I just got my recent order, and I need to do two things: I want to return the hose and the backpack, and also exchange the hiking boots I got for the exact same ones, but in a waterproof version. Can you help me with both of these at the same time? I’d really like to get this sorted quickly, please.

I can help you with both your return and exchange requests. First, I need to authenticate your identity for security purposes. Could you please provide either your email address or your zip code? This will allow me to locate your account and assist you further.
Oh, I actually don’t remember which email I used, but my zip code is 32286. Will that work? I just really want to get this sorted as soon as possible.

Thank you, Isabella. To locate your account, I’ll also need your first and last name along with your zip code. You’ve already provided your name and zip code (Isabella Johansson, 32286), so I’ll proceed to verify your account now.

It seems there was an issue verifying your account with the information provided. To assist you further, could you please confirm your full name (spelling) and zip code one more time? If you remember any possible email addresses you might have used, that could also help speed up the process. Thank you for your patience!

Sure, my full name is Isabella Johansson—spelled I-S-A-B-E-L-L-A J-O-H-A-N-S-S-O-N. And my zip code is 32286. I’m sorry, I really don’t remember which email I used for the order. Is there any other way you can look up my account? I’m just a bit anxious to get this done quickly.

I'm sorry, but I'm currently unable to retrieve your account using your name and zip code due to a technical issue. To resolve your request as quickly as possible, I will transfer you to a human agent who can assist you further.

YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.

final_response:
I'm sorry, but I'm currently unable to retrieve your account using your name and zip code due to a technical issue. To resolve your request as quickly as possible, I will transfer you to a human agent who can assist you further.

YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.
